decoded_text.generated:
GPU warmup causes initial latency spikes that artificially inflate the denominator in token-per-second calculations. This transient inefficiency results in a lower average throughput that does not reflect the model's steady-state performance. Consequently, the reported metrics become misleading indicators of actual inference speed.
